race.comment: MY PHAR LADY (8) deep into her prep and showed a stack of grit fourth-up with a narrow victory over 1400m here in BM72 class. Extra trip shouldn't pose a problem from the good gate. TENDERIZE (5) drawn a good marble today and has excellent figures over this track and trip. Pushed forward from the wide barrier with a courageous fourth over 1600m at Randwick in this grade. That form looks good enough for this. Solid each-way player. COSMIC AVENGER (12) gone to a new level this time in, winning at his last two outings on the provincial circuit. Deserves his chance in town with Berry retaining the ride from a low barrier. Among the leading chances. DUSTY BAY (7) was a month between runs when out of his depth with a fading on-pace eighth to Sheza Alibi over 1600m in the G1 Randwick Guineas. Huge class drop and strips fitter for this. BELLA KHADIJAH (6) caught the eye in two runs back and only has to overcome the wide barrier to sneak into the minor money.
